ref.title: Alert (Origin Feat)
body: Initiative Proficiency: you add your Proficiency Bonus to Initiative.
Initiative Swap: right after rolling Initiative, you may trade your result with a willing ally's — push the right teammate to the top of the order, or drop your control before the enemy acts.

ref.title: Crafter (Origin Feat)
body: You gain proficiency with three Artisan's Tools of your choice. When buying nonmagical gear, you receive a 20% discount, and you can craft items in half the normal time.

ref.title: Healer (Origin Feat)
body: With a Healer's Kit you can use an action to let a creature spend a Hit Die to heal. You reroll 1s on all healing dice you roll.

ref.title: Lucky (Origin Feat)
body: You have Luck Points equal to your Proficiency Bonus, regained on a long rest.
Advantage: when you roll a d20 for a d20 Test (attack roll, ability check, or saving throw), you can spend 1 Luck Point to give yourself Advantage.
Disadvantage: when a creature makes an attack roll against you, you can spend 1 Luck Point to impose Disadvantage on that roll.

grantsPool.label: Luck Points
grantsPool.reminder: Lucky: gain Advantage on a d20 Test, or impose Disadvantage on an attack against you.

ref.title: Musician (Origin Feat)
body: You gain proficiency with three Musical Instruments of your choice. After completing a long or short rest, you can play an instrument to grant Heroic Inspiration to allies (max equal to your Proficiency Bonus) who hear you.

ref.title: Resilient
body: Increase one ability by 1 and gain proficiency in saving throws using that ability.

ref.title: Savage Attacker (Origin Feat)
body: Once per turn when you hit with a weapon attack, you can roll the weapon's damage dice twice and use the higher total.

ref.title: Shadow Touched (Origin Feat)
body: Increase an ability of your choice by 1. You learn Invisibility and one 1st-level Illusion or Necromancy spell, each castable once per long rest without a slot (or with slots).

ref.title: Skilled (Origin Feat)
body: You gain proficiency in any three skills or tools of your choice.

ref.title: Tavern Brawler (Origin Feat)
body: Your unarmed strike deals 1d4 damage. When you hit with an unarmed strike or improvised weapon, you can shove or knock the target prone. You reroll 1s on unarmed and improvised weapon damage, and you're proficient with Improvised Weapons.

ref.title: Tough (Origin Feat)
body: Your hit point maximum increases by an amount equal to twice your level. Whenever you gain a level, your hit point maximum increases by 2.
